programs.title: Caught!
programs.desc: People take advantage of every element, especially fire, water, ice, and air, when performing dangerous stunts and concocting crazy contraptions.

programs.title: Caught!
programs.desc: Serving others is a noble cause, unless it's in the service industry; between bad customers and broken machines, it can be a total nightmare.

programs.title: Caught!
programs.desc: Courtroom chaos caught on camera; if the judge's gavel isn't enough to calm down criminals, brave bailiffs and cops have to step in; shocking attacks, escape attempts, and stolen firearms make for a very dramatic day in court.

programs.title: Caught!
programs.desc: Throughout history, thrill-seekers have dared to perform outrageous stunts and jeopardize their safety for glory; in modern times, it is internet virality that drives such individuals.

programs.title: Caught!
programs.desc: Nature's creatures don't always stay in the wild; from four-legged intruders to thieving beasts, when animals and humans meet -- these feisty critters won't back down.

programs.title: Contraband: Seized at the Airport
programs.desc: Officers get intelligence on a passenger heading to London carrying an illicit load; when questioned, the man says he's meeting with Braveheart; a shipment of high-end construction equipment throws up red flags when its quality looks shoddy.
